productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Rift MTR White Casual Shoe
description: The nike Air Rift MTR for men with its split-toe for a customised Fit and incredible lightness is a favourite among comfort junkies who love sport. The shoe is made out of tough jersey material, and the bottom of the shoe has two channels that separate the ball of the foot from the rest. The Air Rift has an open top, and allows air to pass through the split-toe. There is light lycra fabric under the split toe and it breathes well. It also has a heel strap, so there is open air here as well. The padding on this shoe is designed for optimal grip. UpperFabric upper with a four-way stretch mesh Split toe for a customised fitArticulated forefoot Hook-and-loop closure on the midfoot areaAnkle strap at the back with a velcro closureSoft, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleFull length, sculpted Phylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfortOutsoleAir-Sole unit in the heelBRS 1000 Waffle outsole with a modified forefoot Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
